notes: Single-suite test layout: synthetic git fixtures.
- evals/generic/  — synthetic git fixtures, deterministic, runnable in any repo (CI gate, MUST pass).
Custom presets MUST add a corresponding fixture under evals/generic/ covering their categorization rules.

Projects that need historical SHA-bound goldens (asserting byte-identical output against frozen commits) can add their own evals/<projectname>/ suite + extend check-golden.sh. See references/presets.md.

suites.name: generic
suites.description: Self-contained fixtures: each fixture-NN.sh spins a tmp git repo, runs deploy-list with a known preset, diffs against expected-fixture-NN.txt. Covers php-yii, laravel, node, python, generic, and --anchor mode (rg-based).
